# fluttersdk_artisan

> Composable CLI framework and stdio MCP server for Flutter and Dart. Scaffolding, code generation, transactional plugin installs, hot reload orchestration, REPL, and AI agent tool surfaces in one binary.

Pure Dart 3.4+ CLI framework. Consumed via `dart run fluttersdk_artisan <command>`. 21 built-in commands plus a stdio MCP server for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf).

## Docs
- [Installation](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/getting-started/installation.md)
- [Quickstart](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/getting-started/quickstart.md)
- [Command catalog](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/commands/index.md)
- [start](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/commands/start.md)
- [plugin:install](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/commands/plugin-install.md)
- [mcp:serve](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/commands/mcp-serve.md)
- [make:plugin](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/commands/make-plugin.md)
- [install](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/commands/install.md)
- [tinker](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/commands/tinker.md)
- [MCP overview](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/mcp/overview.md)
- [MCP setup](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/mcp/setup.md)
- [MCP tool reference](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/mcp/tool-reference.md)
- [Plugin authoring](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/plugins/authoring.md)
- [install.yaml schema](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/plugins/install-yaml.md)
- [Installer DSL](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/plugins/installer-dsl.md)
- [Signature DSL](https://fluttersdk.com/artisan/reference/signature-dsl.md)
